message:
feat(python): numpy.kron wrapper parity (franken_numpy-umqb)

Add fnp_python.kron(a, b) as a passthrough delegator to np.kron
preserving the Kronecker product output shape (broadcasted from
a.shape × b.shape), dtype promotion, and n-dimensional
broadcasting semantics across real/complex/integer/2-D inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with six scenarios: 2x2 ⊗ 2x2,
1-D ⊗ 1-D, integer 2x2 ⊗ 2x2 (exact equality), mismatched-rank
2-D ⊗ 1-D, complex128 1-D ⊗ 1-D, and I_2 ⊗ I_3 → block-diagonal
6x6 identity. Each compared via numpy.allclose / array_equal
against np.kron.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
